notes: Full publisher PDF retrieved 2026-04-30 via UCSD institutional access for offline markdown extraction. PDF is publisher-copyrighted and is NOT committed to this public repo (gitignored at research/collection/science/yamins2014-performance-optimized/source.pdf).
